channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Problem With Tech's Latest “Something Big Is Happening” Manifesto
item.description: A critical take on Matt Shumer’s viral AI manifesto, examining labor market disruption, hype cycles and the real path to responsible AI adoption.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Saturday, February 14 Clues And Answers (#979)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.

item.title: The Last Human Monopoly In The Age Of AI
item.description: AI can do everything except own an outcome. In the age of AI, accountability is the last human monopoly and the only currency that matters. Here's how...

item.title: The Finger-Pointing About Highguard’s Failure Is In Full Effect
item.description: Highguard is about to completely collapse after mass layoffs, but there are heated debates about who is to blame for its failure.

item.title: The Compressed Timeline Of The AI Revolution
item.description: AI’s rise feels faster and deeper than past tech shifts—reshaping not just what we build, but how we build, learn, and evolve in an accelerating feedb...

item.title: The next generation of AI businesses
item.description: The first generation was built on large models, demonstrating what could be done and powering many tools. The second generation is focused on reducing...

item.title: Tip for tap
item.description: There is plenty of unintentional harm in our world. We’ve all been bruised or derailed by someone who had no ill intent. We often respond with intenti...

item.title: Time well spent
item.description: What an admirable goal. Perhaps the overriding goal of all goals. How often do we measure this? Do we even know how? Do the systems we’re in push us f...

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...
